{{Infobox character
| name = Oleana
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] fights in a makeshift [[arena]] made out of an [[Imperial Palace basement]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] is a [[Champion]] who prefers to start battles by giving her opponents a choice of weapon while she fights bare-handed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] has Palace rooms.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] was born near the docks.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
